Based Huntsville, Alabama, Redstone Federal Credit Union been proudly serving Tennessee Valley since 1951.

grow their membership increase their wallet share, RFCU wanted shift from marketing one-off campaigns responding existing prospective members through triggered messaging when members became engaged with RFCU, such specific product page website.

ability create drip campaigns, segment their audience, stream communications with different paths were also important features RFCU's search right solution.
With automation, RFCU imagined creating content strategy engage both existing future members.
RFCU also wanted keep track their membership order determine when where demand high enough that future branches might opened.
RFCU identified investigated several marketing automation solutions, they chose Marketo.
While RFCU recognized Marketo's thought leadership appreciated helpful knowledgeable staff, their main reason selecting that offered most robust capabilities while also being easy use.
RFCU leveraged Marketo develop strategy drive awareness capture website visitors with interesting content through both outbound campaigns well with landing pages their website.
first months with Marketo, RFCU created impactful campaigns.
first campaign cross-sell nurture campaign inform members about RFCU's five great checking account products.
second variety landing pages offering advice-oriented content support online advertising capturing prospective member interest.

campaign annual online goal checking account conversions just weeks.
part this campaign, RFCU sent series emails 140,000 contacts, which resulted 2,400 content downloads created 5,500 upgraded accounts.
